title: Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call January 27, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Taylor - VP, IR Devin Stockfish - CEO Davie Wold - CFO Conference Call Participants Susan Maklari - Goldman Sachs George Staphos - Bank of America Anthony Pettinari - Citi Ketan Mamtora - BMO Capital Markets Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Paul Quinn - RBC Capital Markets Kurt Yinger - D.A. Davidson Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Weyerhaeuser Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: The Value Of Timberland
text: Timberland REITs are hard to value on cashflows alone. Cyclicality of lumber prices often dictates short-term earnings.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Tops Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Weyerhaeuser (WY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 33.33% and 3.21%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 7 Stocks to Buy as Inflation Fears Fade
text: After a rough 2022, investors are optimistic, bargain-hunting for top stocks to buy. Helping, markets are anticipating slower rate hikes from the Federal Reserve in Feb., and March.

title: Factor Setting the Tone for Weyerhaeuser's (WY) Q4 Earnings
text: The impacts of slow construction activities, higher raw material costs, and lower lumber and OSB pricing are likely to reflect on Weyerhaeuser's (WY) fourth-quarter results.

title: Here's Why the Drop in Home Construction Hurts Weyerhaeuser
text: Lumber prices are back down to normal levels, which means lower earnings.
